title: How Did You Celebrate the 20th Anniversary of NGE
display_title: How Did You Celebrate the 20th Anniversary of NGE
wikitext:
[]: How Did You Celebrate the 20th Anniversary of NGE?             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Tue Oct 06, 2015 5:22 pm I got the idea after reading this: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17784/What-Are-you-expecting-From-the-20th-anniversary10-04-2015/ Anyway, my celebration was rather simplistic, but nice. I bought a copy of Tony Takezaki's Neon Genesis Evangelion manga (which I was reading for the first time) and I read the whole thing in one sitting. My reaction throughout that experience: I particularly loved whole "fan service" thing (for some reason Ritsuko's coffee-based destruction of the Magi really stands out) when Rei shows up to school bandaged and bloodied as well as when she tries to re-enact the "toast scene" from the AU at the end of ep. 26 and fails miserably. XD Needless to say, I enjoyed it very much and it was an amazingly crazed and utterly hilarious way to celebrate 20 years of what is (in my opinion) of the greatest works ever created for television. Later that evening, I sat down and watched the first episode of the series. My intention with this is to watch each episode weekly (so every Sunday until some time in March), OA cuts only. Then, I'll watch D&R (I might skip this), the DC episodes, and finish it all off with EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Oct 06, 2015 5:48 pm ^ That's nice. I'm currently rewatching the whole series for the first time since 5 years. And I'm so happy to say, I like it even more than my fond memories led me to belief.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Oct 06, 2015 5:50 pm I actually didn't get the chance to do anything on the day itself as I was away all day and only got back to Edinburgh late on the evening. That said I've been celebrating the 20th anniversary of the show pretty much all year. I've gotten myself back into writing Fan Fic for it, I finally cosplayed Shinji properly at a few conventions, me and my friend also did a big Shinji/Asuka photoshoot and I gave the series/EoE that much needed rewatch I had been wanting to do for so long. I made a post on my Tumblr on the day of the anniversary though. I realised as well that this December marks ten years since I first watched the series.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Oct 06, 2015 6:12 pm I bought the new sets. I've also recently watched from ep 18 to the end of 26, which it's a while since I did. But I don't bother with specific dates.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Oct 06, 2015 7:04 pm I watched the Platinum dub of Episode 1 for the first time, and then I did a marathon of Puchi Eva!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Oct 06, 2015 8:16 pm In all honesty, I wasn't thinking about the anniversary on the day of. I did happen to be wearing an Evangelion shirt though, so I guess I suitably honored things.

[]:             Quote Post by santi » Tue Oct 06, 2015 8:31 pm I just watched the first episode of the series (one of my favourites) , then watched girlfriend of steel (dont know why ^ ^) and finished with Death and Rebirth. Love that Pachelbel song..

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 06, 2015 8:32 pm I wore my "私 東京-3" t-shirt and watched Episode 1 in the 2.0 stereo mix for the first time ever. The difference in the music track intrigued me very much. I actually think that the music in Unit 01's introduction was more emotionally poignant than the 5.1 down mix. (Though, I should get an actual surround sound system before judging it finally.)

[]:             Quote Post by r1cepurin » Tue Oct 06, 2015 9:19 pm I drew gay furry porn of ShinjixKensukexToji No, seriously. I'm not saying that to be funny or obnoxious, I'm an enormous flaming furry and that's what I did. I did this while wearing my "I <3 KNOTS" shirt

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 06, 2015 9:21 pm r1cepurin wrote: I did this while wearing my "I <3 KNOTS" shirt

[]:             Quote Post by r1cepurin » Tue Oct 06, 2015 9:22 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Could this, pray-tell, be a reference to "Knothole?"

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Thu Oct 08, 2015 9:03 am Nothing major since i am not near my Evangelion copies but i spent some hours reading some wiki articles.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Thu Oct 08, 2015 5:40 pm Nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Oct 08, 2015 6:59 pm You'd think with all the hype the anniversary got, we'd at the very least be seeing more new fanart.

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Fri Oct 09, 2015 6:29 am Organizing a complete rewatch on my Facebook page with readers and friends ;)

[]:             Quote Post by The Cruel » Fri Oct 09, 2015 2:13 pm I Celebrated the 20th Anniversary of Eva with a five day long rewatch of both NGE and Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Fri Oct 09, 2015 3:15 pm xPearse wrote: Nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Oct 09, 2015 3:54 pm Wait, does showing the Evangelion 2.0 movie on Adult Swim either this year or last year count as something for the 20th anniversary?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 09, 2015 4:55 pm Well, no, not really - because last year or earlier this year wasn't yet the 20th anniversary, and the anniversary this autumn is in any case that of the series (NGE), not of the theatrical edition (NTE).

[]:             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Fri Oct 09, 2015 5:41 pm pwhodges wrote: Well, no, not really - because last year or earlier this year wasn't yet the 20th anniversary, and the anniversary this autumn is in any case that of the series (NGE), not of the theatrical edition (NTE).
